title: 99 Nights in The Forest
description: Old Growth Pine Taiga ONLY and adds 99 Nights in The Forest with basic functionality including a monster, players, a campfire, and upgrades, no abilities yet.
body:
**This is a data pack for version 1.21.10.**

## How to play:
1. Load a single biome world with the biome of Old Growth Pine Taiga
2. type: 
```
/reload
```
This will start it, it needs a minimum of 2 players, and scales in difficulty with every extra player.

The Monster(Chosen player) has a task to do(or not) every night including: findind water, stalking and killing campers.

The Monster CAN'T go near the fire if its working.

To use the campfire, use the provided or a new found axe, make sure its in the axe slot, get wood, and throw it one by one on to the campfire.

An easy way to find home is to look in the sky for a yellow flash. (Only works if the campfire is on)

There are custom structures, they contain loot that can be helpful.

## Win Condtions:
1. The monster kills all campers
2. The players make it through all 99 nights
